title: Euan's Visuals Pack
description: A visual-focused pack that enhances Minecraft’s aesthetics and interface, without affecting performance or core gameplay.
body:
![Euan's Visuals Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/645e0c609c14e5ff5f572f889a16baf17e7c899e.png)_Clean visuals. Polished UI._

My very own curated collection of mods that improve how Minecraft looks and feels, all without impacting gameplay or straying from the vanilla experience. From subtle lighting upgrades to crisp HUD elements, this pack keeps things immersive, sleek, and performance-friendly.

- ✅ No gameplay changes
- ✅ No heavy shaders or overhauls
- ✅ Just clean, aesthetic enhancements

**Check out my other modpacks:**
* [Euan's Optimized Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/euans-optimized-pack)
* [Euan's QOL Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/euans-qol-pack)
* [Euan's Tools Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/euans-tools-pack)
---
If you have any questions or run into issues, you can join my Discord server through the project’s links!
